hero.description: 150+ updates to sell, shop, and build everywhere

agentic.title: Agentic
agentic.subhead: The only platform you need to be in every AI channel

products.title: Your products optimized for AI

media.playLabel: Play video: Your products optimized for AI

body: Shopify gets your products in AI channels automatically. See how you’re performing, track sales, and get guidance on what’s missing to drive conversion.

ctas.label: Learn about selling in AI
ctas.ariaLabel: Learn about selling in AI, Your products optimized for AI

products.title: Product data structured for agents

image.alt: Close-up of structured data for a product with fields and values highlighted in green on a dark background, representing how Shopify Catalog organizes product data for AI agents

body: automatically standardizes and enriches your product data. Data syndicated by Shopify drives 2x more conversion in AI chats.

products.title: Checkout on more surfaces

image.alt: A smartphone shows an AI chat assistant recommending a lime-green Viviane Tote handbag with product details, price, and a Buy button to check out inside the conversation

body: Shopping in Copilot, and soon Meta ads, is powered by the Universal Commerce Protocol. Customers can purchase directly in chat and pay with Shop Pay in Copilot.

products.title: Agentic plan
body: Businesses not on Shopify can sync their products to Shopify Catalog and sell across AI channels and in the Shop app.

products.title: The open protocol for agentic commerce

media.playLabel: Play video: The open protocol for agentic commerce

body: Build agentic shopping experiences from discovery to purchase with Catalog, Cart, and Checkout MCPs powered by the Universal Commerce Protocol.

ctas.label: Explore dev docs
ctas.ariaLabel: Explore dev docs, The open protocol for agentic commerce

products.title: Sponsored products with Catalog API

image.alt: A row of product recommendation cards showing apparel, including a green dress, surfaced through the Catalog API

body: Earn revenue on sales made in your agentic experiences with Catalog API. Developer preview coming soon.

products.title: Catalog API supports Shop sign-in

image.alt: A "Sign in with Shop" card showing shopper Stella Bandoc's profile photo, name, and email above a purple "Sign in with Shop" button

body: Add Shop sign-in to experiences built with Catalog API, so shoppers can connect their Shop account. Personalized search results coming soon.

products.title: Catalog API image search
body: Agents can pass images directly to the Catalog API to return visually similar products and enhance search capabilities.

products.title: Catalog API product lookup
body: Use the product ID or URL to retrieve real-time data, like pricing and availability, for up to 50 products in a single request.

products.title: Richer product data in agentic experiences
body: Agents can show product details from the Catalog API, including media, variants, availability, and offers from multiple sellers.

products.title: Sidekick works with your apps
body: Starting with Judge.me, Klaviyo, Loop, Smile, and more top partners, Sidekick can answer questions about and take action in your apps.

ctas.label: Explore apps
ctas.ariaLabel: Explore apps, Sidekick works with your apps

products.title: Actionable guidance from Sidekick

image.alt: A purple Sidekick Pulse card in the admin prompts the merchant to complete the Marabou Cargo Pant product listing

body: Start every admin session with tips to attract customers, improve conversion, and drive repeat sales.

products.title: Sidekick on Apple Watch

image.alt: An Apple Watch with a purple band displays a Sidekick screen showing store metrics

body: Ask Sidekick to look up information about your business from your Apple Watch.

products.title: Follow-up questions from Sidekick

image.alt: A merchant asks Sidekick to create a social asset featuring several products, and Sidekick replies with a follow-up question with multiple choice answers to get more context

body: Sidekick presents multiple choice answers when it needs more information, so you can quickly clarify the task.

products.title: Multi-task with Sidekick
body: Sidekick keeps working in the background, even when you start a new task, run multiple chats, or close the window.

products.title: Improved editing for Sidekick-generated apps
body: Edit code, preview on desktop and mobile, and track version history in Sidekick's app editor.

products.title: Sidekick everywhere in the Shopify app
body: Type or talk with Sidekick on any screen to get help in context as you edit your store from your phone.

products.title: Sidekick creates customers
body: Describe your customer in plain language, and Sidekick automatically fills out the form.

products.title: Automation tests with Sidekick
body: Generate test events for
automations with Sidekick, and verify your logic works.

products.title: Your AI sales associate
body: Help drive sales with an AI assistant on your online store from our messaging tool
. For customers signed in with Shop, it recommends products based on their history.

ctas.label: Explore AI messaging apps
ctas.ariaLabel: Explore AI messaging apps, Your AI sales associate

products.title: Storefront search delivers more results

image.alt: Storefront search results show several jackets in muted tones even though the query was typed incorrectly in the search field

body: Even when shoppers search on your store using typos or unusual phrasing, they'll get relevant results.

products.title: AI-powered store analysis on any theme
body: Analyze a single theme to get ideas from AI-simulated shoppers on ways to improve your store with SimGym.

products.title: A/B tests on online store and checkout

image.alt: A/B tests for a spring sale theme and spring checkout configuration are set to roll out to all site vistors on June 17 and roll back on June 21

body: Publish a new theme, checkout configuration, or customer accounts setup at a scheduled time or as an A/B test using Rollouts.

products.title: Visualized markets graph

image.alt: The markets section of the admin shows a line graph of international sales performance alongside summary metric cards

body: Understand your
setup with a clearer view across discounts, products, and other settings for each market in one graph.

products.title: Better online store editing on mobile
body: Edit your store in the
with controls designed for mobile, a preview that stays on-screen as you edit, and
built right in.

products.title: Variant-level publishing for products

image.alt: A product publishing panel displays options to manage sales-channel availability for seven individual product variants

body: Control which product variants are published by channel and per market without any workarounds.

products.title: Scheduling and testing for localized themes
body: Translate your theme across markets, then schedule to publish or A/B test it with Rollouts.

products.title: Discounts by market
body: Run targeted promotions for customers across specific regions, different retail locations, and B2B setups.

products.title: Sales channel control in markets
body: Customize product availability, pricing, and currency for each sales channel connection with

products.title: Product compliance disclosure
body: Add mandatory warnings on products and display them on your store, in AI channels, and the Shop app.

products.title: Stacking multiple product discounts
body: Apply multiple discounts to the same product in one order like a percentage off and fixed amount discount.

products.title: Refreshed customer accounts
body: Customer account pages feature intuitive navigation, branded sign-in, and recommendations for first-time shoppers.

products.title: Customer data syncs from identity providers
body: Sync profile fields and custom tags from supported identity providers like Auth0, Ping Identity, and Azure ID.

products.title: 365-day sessions for customer accounts
body: Customers stay signed in for a full year, making it easier for them to pick up where they left off.

products.title: Shopify Smart Pricing app
body: Get product-level pricing tips based on your store's sales, inventory, costs, seasonality.

products.title: Better editing experience on laptops
body: The
and
editors show your sections and settings side by side.

products.title: B2B features on more plans

image.alt: A plan comparison shows B2B features available across the Basic, Grow, and Advanced plans, each marked with a green checkmark

body: Access company profiles, volume pricing, up to three B2B catalogs, and more from your admin at no extra cost.

products.title: Product sourcing insights in Shopify Collective

image.alt: A set of product cards in Shopify Collective show sourcing insights for items such as sunscreen

body: Retailers can make data-informed sourcing decisions with visibility into empty search results, audience trends, and milestones.

products.title: Tax-inclusive pricing for Shopify Collective

image.alt: A product listing for a pink jacket priced at €99.00 with a label indicating tax-inclusive pricing

body: B2B taxes are automatically calculated for tax-inclusive pricing, protecting profitability and effective margins.

products.title: Improved product discovery in Shopify Collective
body: Find and add products faster with category pills, more filtering options, and the ability to import products before payments are set up.

products.title: Shipping performance and trust badges
body: Suppliers can view their shipping performance in
, and earn a Verified Tracking badge to boost their discoverability.

products.title: Shopify Collective available in Australia
body: Businesses in Australia can manage existing
and
or connect with new partners from the admin.

products.title: Automated vaulted payments
body: Automatically charge vaulted payment methods for B2B customers using a
action triggered by fulfillment, due dates, or invoicing.

products.title: QuickBooks and Mailchimp natively support B2B
body: Sync B2B orders, PO numbers, and company details to
. Create B2B segments to send targeted emails with

products.title: Our fastest-ever POS
body: Save over a minute when creating new customers, adding products, and checking out in a cart that's always present. The line never stops, and staff focus on customers.

ctas.label: Read about our latest version
ctas.ariaLabel: Read about our latest version, Our fastest-ever POS

products.title: Rebuilt POS checkout in action

media.playLabel: Play video: Rebuilt POS checkout in action

body: Retail staff at Province of Canada share how they can feel the difference using POS v11.

products.title: Scannable discounts in Shopify POS

image.alt: A phone displays a QR code being scanned at checkout with a "Discount applied" confirmation

body: Generate QR codes in the admin, share them with customers, then scan those codes at checkout to apply discounts in store.

products.title: Verifone Victa Mobile for Shopify POS

image.alt: A hand holding a black Verifone Victa Mobile card reader against a red background

body: Scan barcodes, take payments, and run
on the new handheld that doubles as a terminal when docked. Pre-order available for US and Canada.

products.title: Faster search in Shopify POS
body: Find products, customers, and orders faster with inline suggestions and reduced latency across every search page.

products.title: Returns and exchanges in one cart
body: Process
, and new sales in one cart with smart grid actions and modular workflows in

products.title: Gift card cashout
body: Cash out low-balance gift cards directly from
to meet local redemption laws.

products.title: In-person pickup orders
body: Create orders for pickup at any retail location in
. Notify customers, and mark orders as fulfilled. Exclusive to POS Pro.

products.title: Editor works with smart grid
body: Swap assigned products and update tile input fields in
Access the lock screen and customer display settings in a refreshed layout.

products.title: Manually enable offline checkout by device
body: Staff with the right permissions can enable offline checkout from
device settings to keep selling when connectivity drops.

products.title: Keyboard shortcuts for Shopify POS
body: Build carts and navigate products, orders, and customers faster with a keyboard.

products.title: In-store only discounts
body: Create code-based and automatic discounts that only apply in person, keeping in-store promotions separate from online.

products.title: Packing slips for outgoing transfers
body: Print an itemized manifest with origin, destination, and transfer details for outgoing inventory transfers from

products.title: Permission settings for customer data
body: Control which staff can view sensitive customer details like names, emails, and addresses with a new permission setting in

products.title: Receive and fulfill transfers
body: Receive incoming purchase orders and fulfill outgoing transfers to your locations in
. Exclusive to POS Pro.

products.title: Multi-entity selling across retail locations
body: Operate multiple retail locations within a single country from different legal entities, all managed from one Shopify store. Exclusive to Shopify Plus.

products.title: Tap to Pay for multi-entity businesses
body: Multi-entity businesses on
can activate Tap to Pay for all retail locations, and accept contactless payments for
and
. Exclusive to Shopify Plus.

products.title: Multi-entity offline payments
body: Offline payments work across multi-entity retail setups for
. Transaction limits are inherited across all stores.

products.title: Cash visibility and control in Shopify POS
body: Set cash rules and reason codes, track all drawer opens and activity across registers, require mid-session cash counts, and reconcile with audit trails. Exclusive to POS Pro.

products.title: Introducing Campaign Autopilot
body: Run campaigns across channels with AI-powered marketing that learns, optimizes, and drives performance. Set guardrails to stay in control, and track results over time.

ctas.label: Read about automating your marketing
ctas.ariaLabel: Read about automating your marketing, Introducing Campaign Autopilot

products.title: Shop Campaigns on more channels

image.alt: A duffel bag is next to the logos for Pinterest, ChatGPT, and Microsoft Monetize. An ad for the duffel bag is displayed for each channel.

body: Run one campaign across channels with
, including ChatGPT, programmatic ads via Microsoft Monetize, and Pinterest.

products.title: Simplified setup and bidding in Shop Campaigns

image.alt: The average customer acquistion cost is overlaid on top of an Instagram ad for a magenta tote bag that's being run by the Shop app

body: Set up one campaign with custom bids for segments like new or lapsed customers, and run it across channels.

products.title: WhatsApp marketing channel

image.alt: The WhatsApp logo beside a smartphone that's composing a marketing message with a list of selectable options

body: Create and manage WhatsApp marketing campaigns in

products.title: SMS and marketing automations
body: Create and manage marketing automations in
, now including SMS automations.

products.title: Smart email delivery
body: intelligently prioritizes which messages to send and hold back, optimizing for conversion.

products.title: Standardized ads billing for Shop Campaigns
body: charges appear on your Shopify invoice with centralized reporting and billing in the admin.

products.title: Marketing data in analytics
body: View marketing reports in analytics with spend, ROAS, impressions, and sessions alongside sales.

products.title: Discount links attributed to campaigns
body: Attribute discount links to their associated campaign to accurately track traffic and conversion.

products.title: Fixed bundles on Google Shopping and Meta
body: Publish pre-configured bundles across Google search and ads, YouTube, Facebook, and Instagram.

products.title: Marketing consent on sign-in
body: Capture email marketing opt-ins on your customer sign-in page.

products.title: WhatsApp consent management
body: Control WhatsApp marketing consent in each customer's profile alongside their email and SMS consent.

products.title: More vibe-coding partners

image.alt: A terminal in dark mode describes vibe-coding integrations with the logos of the partner developer tools

body: Describe your business and spin up a Shopify store with Manus, Replit, V0, or Lovable.

products.title: Store management with agents

image.alt: An agent is asked to add a product to a store and a bag is added, then the logos for Claude, ChatGPT, and Perplexity are displayed

body: Run your store inside Claude, ChatGPT, or Perplexity. Add products, create collections, and manage orders from the chat.

products.title: Shopify AI Toolkit

image.alt: A terminal in dark mode shows developer commands and configuration for the Shopify AI Toolkit

body: Manage your store from AI platforms like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, VS Code, and more.

products.title: Better context for your store's data

media.playLabel: Play video: Better context for your store's data

body: Understand your numbers, so you can take action, with daily insights and more context on your store in analytics.

ctas.label: Read what's new
ctas.ariaLabel: Read what's new, Better context for your store's data

products.title: New data visualizations in analytics
body: Get a deeper understanding of your data with scatter plots, radars, bubble charts, and sunbursts.

products.title: Daily insights in analytics
body: Shopify analyzes your data and surfaces the most important trends in the analytics overview.

products.title: Annotations in analytics charts
body: Visual markers in analytics charts explain why your metrics changed.

products.title: Metric targets in analytics
body: Set targets for key metrics and visually track your progress.

products.title: Multi-metric data visualizations
body: Plot multiple metrics together in line or bar and line charts to spot patterns in your analytics.

products.title: Analytics filtered by metafields
body: Filter and group analytics reports by your custom structured data.

products.title: Metafields added in context of workflows
body: Create metafields from customers, orders, and collections in the admin without navigating to settings.

products.title: More pinned metafields
body: Pin up to 50 metafields on product, customer, and order sections without clicking into a separate page.

products.title: Discounts on refund page
body: Apply discounts directly on the refund page while maintaining accurate sales and tax financials.

products.title: Consistent calculations across returns and upsells
body: Pricing on returns and upsells uses the same logic as checkout, so there aren't discrepancies.

products.title: Visibility for app activity
body: Track what apps are doing, where extensions and functions run, and what data they access.

products.title: Staff payments permissions
body: Delegate management of payments, payouts, and disputes to staff with granular permissions.

products.title: Custom pricing on draft orders
body: Override line item prices and apply custom discounts directly on draft orders.

products.title: Filtering and saved views across admin
body: Search, filter, and save views from one search bar across sections in the admin.

products.title: Category-specific return reasons
body: Whether customers return items online or in store, return reasons now match what they bought, so you get better data.

products.title: Code editor in Shopify Flow
body: Write code faster with syntax highlighting, autocomplete, and formatting in Liquid variables for

products.title: Automatic shipping label purchasing
body: Create rules in
that buy shipping labels when specific triggers occur.

products.title: Version history
body: See who updated a workflow and when it was edited to track changes in

products.title: Workflow notes
body: Add notes to any
workflow, so collaborators understand your logic.

products.title: ShopifyQL and more Admin API fields in automations
body: Access analytics data and more Admin API fields in your
automations without writing code.

products.title: Enhanced inventory management
body: Make purchasing decisions with
, scan barcodes to receive shipments, keep counts accurate across channels, and turn returns into data.

ctas.label: Read what's new
ctas.ariaLabel: Read what's new, Enhanced inventory management

products.title: SKU sharing required across locations
body: Stock the same variant across multiple locations without duplicating inventory items.

products.title: Faster inventory syncing
body: Back-in-stock updates reach your online store faster during high-traffic events with performance improvements.

products.title: Pickup order fulfillment from multiple sources
body: Fulfill pickup orders using both in-store stock and transferred inventory.

products.title: Shipment-level barcode receiving
body: Scan shipment barcodes like GS1-128 to receive inventory transfers faster in the admin.

products.title: Inventory tracking separated from active products
body: Manage or move stock at locations independently of where products are actively for sale.

products.title: Smarter purchase order workflows
body: can generate your purchase orders, which now automatically create transfers.

products.title: Inventory adjustment workflows
body: Adjust or set inventory quantities with a full audit trail for every change.

products.title: Order cancellation requests
body: Customers can request to cancel their order before fulfillment or return it after fulfillment from the order status page.

products.title: Batch fulfillment workflow
body: Group orders into batches and fulfill them through a customizable pick, pack, scan, and ship workflow.

ctas.label: Fulfill your orders in batches
ctas.ariaLabel: Fulfill your orders in batches, Batch fulfillment workflow

products.title: FedEx One Rate®
body: US businesses can get flat-rate shipping with pricing based on the size of the package.

products.title: Advanced shipping options
body: Customize order value and weight conditions in one shipping option with consumer-facing descriptions and transit times.

products.title: Fulfillment status for canceled orders
body: Canceled or refunded orders now show a "not required" status.

products.title: Local pickup emails
body: Send and resend local pickup notification emails from the admin. Apps can also send confirmation emails using the API.

products.title: Manual delivery confirmation
body: Mark orders as delivered for unsupported carriers, so customers no longer see "on its way."

products.title: Shipping labels billed in local currency
body: Pay in CAD, EUR, GBP, or your local currency without conversion for label charges.

products.title: FedEx in Managed Markets
body: Ship orders with prepaid duties using FedEx International Connect Plus® in

products.title: DHL Kleinpaket in Germany
body: Ship packages under 1kg in Germany for less with DHL Kleinpaket.

products.title: Delivery carrier auto-detection
body: Manual tracking numbers automatically detect DHL, EVRi, Australia Post, and other top carriers.

products.title: UPS return labels
body: US businesses can buy UPS return labels from the admin, and only pay when the label is used.

products.title: Managed Markets in the UK and Canada
body: Businesses in the UK and Canada can sell globally with support for duties, taxes, compliance and more.

products.title: Managed international pricing strategy
body: Enable dynamically localized prices that include duties, taxes, and fees with

products.title: Product restriction reassessment
body: Edit products to trigger a new review, and get more products approved for sale with

products.title: Faster setup for Managed Markets
body: Start selling internationally in minutes, and instantly localize your customer experience across markets.

products.title: Duty calculation breakdown
body: See how duties are calculated with a detailed breakdown of each factor that contributes to the final amount.

products.title: Gift cards in local currencies
body: Sell and redeem gift cards in your customers' local currencies across markets from one store.

products.title: Search designed around shoppers
body: Discover, compare, and research products through conversation. Recommendations are shaped by shoppers' tastes and history on
and get smarter over time.

to your retail store. Get discovered, offer in-store pickup, and easy returns.

body: Create posts that get seen by active shoppers in the home feed, their following feeds, and on your store in

from the home feed, top navigation, and product pages, so more of your products show up in new ways.

body: Businesses around the globe can offer customers local and regional payment methods in one wallet with Shop Pay.

accounts. Exclusive to Shopify Plus.

body: uses improved machine learning models to block card testing attacks by scoring transactions for decline and fraud risk.

products.title: Chargeback health monitoring
body: Manage and reduce your chargeback rate with proactive alerts and guidance to improve your standing.

products.title: Higher-converting, redesigned checkout

body: Collect and validate buyer VAT IDs at checkout with
in the EU and UK.

body: Enforce address restrictions in checkouts across online and agentic experiences, using rules in

products.title: Customized branding in checkout, accounts, and sign-in
body: Set your logo, colors, and typography once, and it gets applied consistently across checkout, customer account, and sign-in pages.

products.title: Order value limits for all plans

to prevent checkout when an order falls outside your minimum and/or maximum subtotal.

funding from your
balance instead of bank account debits.

products.title: More control over events

image.alt: Two terminals in dark mode show webhook event configurations with a trigger that fires only when that specific field changes

body: Configure triggers to fire webhooks only on specific field changes, and use custom GraphQL queries to receive only the data you need.

products.title: GraphQL and bulk operations from the CLI

image.alt: A terminal in dark mode shows GraphQL queries and bulk operations running from the Shopify CLI

body: Run queries and bulk operations from agents or your terminal using
, with automatic auth and built-in status tracking.

products.title: All partner stores in Dev Dashboard

image.alt: The Dev Dashboard shows different types of stores together in one central view

body: Dev, client transfer, and collaborator stores live in the Dev Dashboard. It's the new home for building.

products.title: App Events API

image.alt: The admin receives events from an app, and the Dev Dashboard shows logs monitoring the app's performance

body: Send events happening in your app to Shopify, then monitor and manage your app’s performance in the Dev Dashboard.

body: Build apps and manage dev stores in your preferred language with all text in UI and navigation localized.

body: Every Polaris reference doc has more code samples and use cases, clearer descriptions, and better navigation.

products.title: Metafields in ShopifyQL
body: ShopifyQL supports metafields as dimensions and filters using dot-syntax with the Analytics API and online editor.

products.title: Auto-upgrades and semantic versioning in Shopify CLI
body: automatically upgrades for minor and patch releases. Major versions require opt-in, governed by new semantic versioning.

products.title: Safer app deployments
body: Configure CI/CD pipelines that deploy new and updated extensions without accidentally deleting existing ones across live stores.

products.title: Streamlined Metafields and Metaobjects API
body: Read and write metafields and metaobjects more easily with a simpler GraphQL API.

products.title: No backend required for lightweight apps
body: Build an App Home directly in the admin without setting up or maintaining a backend server.

products.title: Discount configuration with admin UI extensions
body: Admin UI extensions can manage discount classes and render conditional UI in the admin based on discount method.

products.title: Accelerated checkout support for add-ons
body: Shop Pay, Apple Pay, and other accelerated checkouts support nested cart lines, so customers can buy add-ons directly from the product page.

products.title: Declarative metaobjects don't require scopes
body: App-owned metaobjects no longer require scopes, so data easily migrates once the app's installed.

products.title: Metaobject data in checkout functions
body: Use metaobject entries in checkout functions to power custom discounts, product rules, and personalized checkout logic.

products.title: Billing address and PO number in Shopify Functions
body: Query billing address and PO number in cart and checkout validation functions to enforce compliance rules and B2B requirements.

products.title: Shopify AI Toolkit for Polaris web components upgrade
body: Upgrade checkout and customer account extensions to Polaris web components with your preferred agent using the

products.title: Role-based access for partners
body: Manage your team through seven system roles, and create custom ones for anything else.

products.title: Improved webhook monitoring
body: Webhook monitoring supports multi-select filters, faceted event counts, and custom time ranges in the Dev Dashboard.

products.title: App automation tokens
body: Create app automation tokens directly in the Dev Dashboard to automate app releases in CI/CD workflows.

products.title: Admin performance
body: Monitor your app's admin web vitals and Built for Shopify standing directly in the Dev Dashboard.

products.title: Parallel reads for bulk queries
body: Run Admin API queries up to four times faster with bulk operations.

products.title: Shopify Dev MCP optimized token usage
body: Responses in Shopify Dev MCP use fewer tokens while maintaining accuracy.

products.title: Shopify Dev MCP for all API versions
body: Get accurate context and code validation for all supported API versions.

products.title: Simple billing with Shopify App Pricing

image.alt: A form displays app pricing plans with fields for plan name, price, and billing interval

body: Configure usage, recurring, or hybrid pricing models in the app submission. Shopify powers the plan selection, charge approval, and invoicing.

products.title: Shop Minis in more parts of Shop

image.alt: A smartphone displays the Shop app, featuring a virtual try-on shopping experience

body: The home feed, top navigation, and product pages surface Shop Minis, so the right shopper finds your experience at the right time.

products.title: Refreshed API for branding checkout and accounts

image.alt: Different checkouts display custom branding in pink, purple, and green

body: Get greater control over branding across checkout, customer accounts, and sign-in using one API for global settings and page-specific tweaks.

products.title: WhatsApp marketing consent
body: Store and manage WhatsApp marketing consent using the
and
APIs.

products.title: Access to sign-in with Shop
body: Use Shop APIs, docs, and an SDK to build new features that let customers authenticate with Shop in one tap directly from your app.

products.title: Shopify AI Toolkit for optimized checkout extensions
body: Use the
to audit checkout UI extensions for performance and get optimization recommendations.

products.title: All-new Hydrogen on any stack
body: Agent-first and rebuilt from the ground up, in collaboration with Vercel,
works with any framework, including Next.js.

products.title: Prerequisites in product discount functions
body: Use a new prerequisites field to specify which items must be purchased before the discount applies for BXGY discount functions.

products.title: Bulk editing extensions for discounts
body: Build extensions for bulk actions on the discount index, so businesses can manage multiple discounts at once.

products.title: Cash management extensions
body: Manage cash sessions, prompt counts, create audit trails, and more with register-centric APIs, reason codes, events, and Shopify POS extension targets.

products.title: SKU sharing by default
body: The permitsSkuSharing field is removed, so inventory can be stocked at multiple locations for any fulfillment service.

products.title: Multi-channel support for sales channel apps
body: Sales channel apps can create multiple channel connections, each with unique specifications for different surfaces or accounts.

products.title: Ship and pick up in one order
body: Test apps, integration, and workflows that interact with delivery, fulfillment, or order logic to ensure checkout compatibility.

products.title: Stronger app security
body: Public apps now use expiring tokens with OAuth 2.0-compliant refresh flows for enhanced security.

products.title: POS UI extensions activation status
body: Query the status of POS UI extensions alongside checkout, admin, customer account, and theme extensions in a unified interface.

products.title: POS UI extensions work without network access
body: Configure POS UI extensions to keep running when a POS device loses network connectivity.

products.title: Localized POS UI extensions
body: Translate POS UI extensions into multiple languages with locale-aware currency and number formatting and pluralization support.

products.title: Camera access for POS UI extensions
body: Access device cameras through the Camera API, so businesses can scan IDs, take product photos, and attach images in Shopify POS.

products.title: Inventory API upgrades
body: Retried commands due to network issues don't risk duplicate writes or inaccurate data with idempotency protection.

products.title: Subscription payment methods natively replaced
body: Customer account UI extensions can natively update payment methods in subscriptions.

products.title: Cart metafields carry over to orders
body: Enable cartToOrderCopyable on order metafield definitions to carry cart metafield values over to orders at checkout completion.

products.title: Pre-populate email on sign-in
body: Use the login_hint parameter to pre-populate the customer's email address when linking to the sign-in page.

products.title: Customer account web component
body: Use a Shopify-managed account component that lets customers sign in and access account menus without leaving the store.

products.title: Standard storefront events and actions
body: Themes can adopt storefront events and actions, so apps and AI agents can reliably interact with the site.

products.title: Streamlined app store submission
body: Fix issues before submission with checks in the Partner Dashboard, and track review feedback without email threads.

products.title: Built for Shopify category requirement
body: Apps in returns and subscriptions categories must use the Customer Account API to authenticate customers in order to keep Built for Shopify status.

products.title: Intents for Shop Minis
body: Use intents in your Shop Mini to pass product context between the Shop app and your Mini, triggering your Mini at the right moment.

products.title: Color palettes for themes
body: Define color palettes in settings that are available across the theme with a new color customization architecture.

products.title: New Collections API
body: Update apps with composable source groups, variant-level conditions, and exclusion rules using the Collections API before rollout to businesses.
